case_title: PEIRCE STERN VS. BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,058.72 FILED BY STERN, PEIRCE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MESHA JACKSON, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,058.72 [AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT'S AGENT FOR SERVICE] FILED BY STERN, PEIRCE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STERN, PEIRCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483 THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE THAT THE DEFENDANT BREACHED ANY CONTRACTS OR DUTY OF CARE OWED TO THE PLAINTIFF OR WAS NEGILIGENT OVER THE LAPTOP THE PLAINTIFF PURCHASED FROM THE DEFENDNAT. THE PLAINTIFF IS STILL WITHIN THE 2 YEAR ADH FROM THE PURCHASE DATE OF 3/26/2021 FOR THE LAPTOP TO BE REPLACED AND/OR REPAIRED. HOWEVER, THE DEFENDNAT WILL NEED TO TAKE POSSESSION OF THE LAPTOP TO HONOR THE WARRANTY. (SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STATE OF DECISION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, PEIRCE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-07-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. EIN 41-0907 483
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 8-3-21)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S AGENT OF SERVICE TO CT CORPORATION SYSTEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERN, PEIRCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF PIERCE STERN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO. INC., REPRESENTED BY MIESHA JACKSON, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
